data.title: OnePay Expands Crypto Offerings with New Token Additions
data.description: Walmart-backed OnePay has expanded its cryptocurrency offerings by adding over a dozen new tokens to its platform, including SUI, Polygon, and Arbitrum. According to NS3.AI, the move aims to enhance the platform's appeal to users who are new to the crypto space. Ron Rojany, a representative from OnePay, noted that the platform is experiencing strong engagement from these newer users, although specific adoption figures were not disclosed.

data.title: Middle East Conflict: Regional Powers Back US-Iran Peace Talks
data.description: Foreign ministers from Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and Turkey have expressed their support for peace talks between the United States and Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing efforts to address the escalating conflict in the Middle East, which has now entered its fifth week. The backing from these regional powers underscores the international community's desire for a diplomatic resolution to the crisis.

data.title: Donald Trump's Rise Rooted in Historical Traditions
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's ascent to power was not an overnight phenomenon marked by a dramatic entrance, such as descending a golden escalator. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that his rise was influenced by deep-seated traditions within U.S. history. These historical patterns have played a significant role in shaping the political landscape and are unlikely to vanish quickly. The enduring nature of these traditions suggests that the impact of Trump's presidency will continue to be felt in the future, reflecting the persistent influence of historical precedents in American politics.

data.title: ZachXBT Uncovers Network of X Accounts with Millions of Followers
data.description: Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT posted on X, revealing the discovery of a network comprising 16 X accounts. These accounts collectively boast a total of 2.23 million followers and are reportedly employing identical strategies in their operations. ZachXBT's investigation highlights the coordinated efforts among these accounts, raising concerns about their activities and potential impact on the platform. The findings underscore the need for vigilance and scrutiny in monitoring social media networks to ensure transparency and authenticity in digital interactions.

data.title: Israel Seeks Solutions for Worship Access at Church of the Holy Sepulchre
data.description: Israel is exploring options to facilitate worship at the Church of the Holy Sepulchre following an incident where police barred the Latin Patriarch from conducting mass due to security concerns. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing discussions aimed at resolving the situation. The Church of the Holy Sepulchre, a significant religious site, has been at the center of security-related challenges, prompting authorities to seek a balance between safety and religious practices. Efforts are underway to ensure that worshippers can access the site while addressing the security issues that led to the recent restrictions.

data.title: Rheinmetall Acknowledges Ukrainian Defense Efforts Amid Drone Remarks
data.description: Rheinmetall, a leading German defense company, has expressed its 'utmost respect' for the defense efforts of Ukrainians against Russia. This statement follows remarks made by the company's chief executive that seemed to downplay the use of drones in the conflict. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's acknowledgment of the significant role played by Ukrainian forces in their ongoing defense operations. Rheinmetall's comments come amid heightened tensions and continued military engagements in the region.

data.title: Ethereum's Supply Increases by Over 81,000 ETH in March
data.description: Ethereum's net supply has risen by 81,790.88 ETH over the past 30 days, according to BlockBeats. Data from Ultrasound.money indicates that the total supply of Ethereum has reached 121,570,566 ETH. The current annual growth rate of Ethereum's supply stands at 0.82%.

data.title: Countries Shift Away from US Dollar Amid Rising US Debt
data.description: Russia, China, Iran, and India are reportedly reducing their reliance on the US dollar as the U.S. national debt reaches $39 trillion. According to NS3.AI, these nations are increasingly utilizing alternatives such as the yuan, gold, barter systems, or local-currency settlements to diversify their reserves and conduct trade, moving away from the dollar.

data.title: CLARITY Act Draft May Impact DeFi Tokens, Says 10x Research
data.description: The latest draft of the CLARITY Act could pose challenges for DeFi tokens, according to 10x Research. The proposed legislation aims to prohibit yield or reward-like features on stablecoin balances. According to NS3.AI, Markus Thielen expressed concerns that this change might shift yield opportunities from crypto-native platforms to traditional financial institutions such as banks, money market funds, and regulated wrappers. This potential re-centralization could impact the decentralized finance sector significantly.

data.title: Ethereum Targets Glamsterdam and Hegota in 2026 After Major Upgrades
data.description: Ethereum has undergone five significant upgrades since transitioning to a proof-of-stake model in 2022. According to NS3.AI, these upgrades have focused on enhancing various aspects of the network. The Dencun upgrade has successfully reduced layer-2 costs, while the Pectra and Fusaka upgrades have expanded staking and rollup data capacity. Looking ahead, Ethereum is aiming for further advancements with Glamsterdam and Hegota set for 2026.

data.title: Iranian Forces Down U.S. Drone in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: A U.S. MQ-9 Reaper drone was reportedly shot down by Iranian Army air defense forces in the eastern Strait of Hormuz. According to Odaily, the incident was reported by the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting on the 29th. The Strait of Hormuz is a strategic waterway, and such incidents can heighten tensions in the region.

data.title: Significant TRX Transfer from Justin Sun to TRON Contract Address
data.description: A substantial transfer of TRX tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 22:53, 700 million TRX were moved from Justin Sun to a contract address beginning with TK8sy9Cg. Subsequently, this address transferred the 700 million TRX to TRON.

data.title: Iranian media: An MQ-9 Reaper drone was shot down.
data.description: According to a report by the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting (IRNA) on the 29th, an MQ-9 Reaper drone was shot down by Iranian army air defense forces in the eastern part of the Strait of Hormuz. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Ethereum Economic Zone Launched to Enhance Layer 2 Network Integration
data.description: Gnosis, Zisk, and the Ethereum Foundation have introduced the Ethereum Economic Zone at the EthCC event in Cannes. According to NS3.AI, this initiative is designed to improve the interoperability of Ethereum layer 2 networks, allowing applications and transactions across different networks to interact seamlessly without the need for bridges. The framework will maintain Ethereum's core security and continue to use ETH as the primary token for transaction fees.

data.title: Egypt to Import Libyan Oil Amid Kuwaiti Supply Disruption
data.description: Egypt plans to import a minimum of 1 million barrels of Libyan oil monthly to address the disruption in Kuwaiti crude supplies. Bloomberg posted on X that the closure of the Strait of Hormuz has effectively halted Kuwaiti oil shipments, prompting Egypt to seek alternative sources. The move underscores the strategic importance of maintaining energy supplies amid geopolitical tensions affecting key maritime routes.

data.title: Gnosis and Zisk launched the Ethereum economic zone Rollup framework, funded by the Ethereum Foundation.
data.description: Gnosis co-founder Friederike Ernst and Zisk founder Jordi Baylina announced the launch of the "Ethereum Economic Zone" (EEZ) Rollup framework at the EthCC conference, with funding from the Ethereum Foundation. This framework aims to improve composability between Rollups, enabling their smart contracts to interact synchronously with the Ethereum mainnet and other EEZ networks while maintaining security consistent with the mainnet. EEZ uses ETH as its default gas token, requiring no additional cross-chain bridge infrastructure. Initial members include Aave, Titan, Beaver Build, Centrifuge, and xStocks, and the project plans to operate as a Swiss non-profit organization. The software will be released as open source, and technical details are expected to be released in the coming weeks. (The Block)

data.title: Geopolitical Tensions and Liquidity Concerns Impact Market Sentiment
data.description:
According to Jin10, a strategy report from Huatai Securities indicates that this week, geopolitical tensions and expectations of global liquidity tightening have led to extremely cautious market sentiment. Amid changes in macro pricing logic, micro-level market dynamics have intensified, with investors seeking certainty in energy sectors such as lithium batteries. However, the sustainability of single-sector rallies is challenged in a shrinking market environment, making the 'cost pass-through' capability within industry chains a key focus.

Looking ahead, the current weak balance is set to face multiple testing periods. Externally, geopolitical variables persist, while domestically, the 'pre-holiday effect' suppresses trading activity. However, from a cross-month perspective, as April ushers in a period of intensive financial report disclosures for A-shares, market pricing anchors are expected to gradually penetrate emotional disturbances and return to fundamental validation.

In terms of allocation, moderate attention should be given to coal, power chains, and chemical raw materials that potentially benefit from high oil prices and possess cost pass-through capabilities, while maintaining a base position in low-level essential consumption.

data.title: Israeli Unity Amid Iran Conflict: Upcoming Elections Crucial, Says Expert
data.description:
Israeli security expert Shira Efron has highlighted the unifying effect of the ongoing conflict with Iran on the Israeli populace. Bloomberg posted on X, noting Efron's insights into the current political climate in Israel. According to Efron, the war has fostered a sense of solidarity among Israelis, transcending political divides and rallying the nation around common security concerns.

However, Efron emphasized that the upcoming elections will be a pivotal moment for the country. The elections are expected to shape Israel's future policies and its approach to regional security challenges. Efron suggests that the outcome could significantly impact the nation's strategic direction and its ability to maintain unity in the face of external threats.

The expert's comments come at a time when Israel is navigating complex geopolitical dynamics, with the Iran conflict being a central issue. As the elections approach, the focus will be on how political leaders address these challenges and the strategies they propose to ensure national security and cohesion.

data.title: Car Incident in Derby Injures Seven, Driver Arrested
data.description:
A car incident in Derby, located in central England, resulted in injuries to at least seven individuals. According to RTHK, the event occurred on Saturday night when a man drove into several pedestrians in the city center. Local police reported that the injuries were serious but not life-threatening.

The 36-year-old male driver has been detained by authorities on charges of attempted murder and dangerous driving. Initial investigations suggest that the incident is not related to terrorism.

data.title: Polls show Trump's disapproval rating has risen to 59%, a record high during his presidency.
data.description: A recent poll released by Fox News shows that approximately 59% of American voters surveyed are dissatisfied with President Trump's administration, an 8-percentage-point increase from a year ago and a new high during his term; the approval rating, however, has fallen from 49% to 41%. The survey was based on a random sample of 1,001 registered voters. Among different parties, Republican voters' approval rating for Trump is 84%, a decrease of 8 percentage points year-over-year; while the disapproval ratings for Democrats and independent voters are 95% and 75%, respectively. (Xinhua)
